{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323011505BD100027ECDE8870F726"}"},"total":2106},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7429653149275603774","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错！很新颖的求生！
不过感觉女主可以生活的更好一点，一直都是找宝箱和物资，应该可以庇护所升级很多次了吧。吃的还是面包。感觉可以多描述一些升级庇护所，然后多的一些设施。","text_exts":[{"e":46,"s":43,"text":"庇护所","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BA%87%E6%8A%A4%E6%89%80&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741997058870F726%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227429653149275603774%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227410747415893920792%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BA%87%E6%8A%A4%E6%89%80%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729857250,"group_id":"7410747415893920792","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一般都在看连载文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxt/KeMqFygypQouTByfUH51x5VA3jPYVz9oo9oQ1ads","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0b0a97ee8d2e4ceca6894cc19fec72e0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791918&x-signature=ZaEAdN1dM7YVdilh90eh9DW0%2BEU%3D","user_id":"3936710991815268","user_name":"禾栗荔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3936710991815268","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7410747415893920792","book_info":{"abstract":"（正文已完结）
（无cp＋基建＋求生＋女强）
留学归来的乌今越，还没开启自己的美好假期。
蓝星巨变，全人类进入异世大陆开荒求生。
异兽入侵，物资难寻，灾难频繁，朝不保夕。
人类像风中的尘埃一样被吞噬。
一穷二白的冒险者开局除了有建造茅草屋的材料外，其他物资都需要自己探寻。
开局一间屋，物资全靠肝。
乌今越：这我熟悉，纪录片里的荒野求生。
有势力邀请抱团取暖？
乌今越：不好意思天生社恐，不和任何人组队。
食物难以下咽，没有调料没滋没味？
乌今越：不行，明天得更努力点，亏待什么也不能亏待自己这张嘴。
手拿从未见过的父母留给她的奇怪玉石，乌今越开局获得神秘天赋抽奖，每天两眼一睁就是肝。
当别人还在苦觅材料加固房屋，乌今越已经住上恒温材料打造的别墅，研究今晚吃什么。
当别人还在费劲寻找生存物资，提升战斗力，乌今越正在开辟第二个庇护所。
种异植，养异兽，造工具，囤物资，乌今越势必要在异世过的如鱼得水。
当世界公告一次又一次播报乌今越的排行榜名次，区服内狂热的冒险者寻找乌今越的坐标，企图横抢武夺。
乌今越公开在频道表示，找到我的，送前往下面的门票一张。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3cde8d4ceca9f544af4a18110a7169ba","author":"047是47","author_id":"","book_id":"7410747415893920792","book_name":"开局一个茅草屋？天赋抽奖来翻盘","book_short_name":"潮生渡千帆","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a85048","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7410802911665455678","read_count":"38110","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2657361"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"1194","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,女强,无CP,囤物资,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/baac476b393b9aba4c93c54b4ae3456e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383705&x-signature=aqz%2BTxAePGsFXRAnTcTbp6GTJHI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"105024429444","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"230"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323011505BD100027ECDE8870F726"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":42948,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":49143,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":34994},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7421589198671397694","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，女主性格也不错，情节也很紧凑，就是女主介绍那里还有部落这一栏，是不是表示这个生存世界还有人类的存在？那之后是不是要与原住民打交道啊？还有就是松鼠和啵啵什么时候可以契约呀？还有还有进来的都是劳动力，那现实世界怎么办？那些老爷爷老奶奶小孩子怎么办？等其他人安定了再进来？我真的好好奇！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727983918,"group_id":"7410747415893920792","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱看小说，不爱更新，勿打扰","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+ASJla8AHqRCGmZYFZ0EU0=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d2d9a722269247a2ad3e90a6e95e7b75~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788261&x-signature=BzR%2BLqTlUfwHTFqIxKqwGftAiuA%3D","user_id":"100536729622","user_name":"言语有灵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100536729622","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1658167148,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_d
